name: Torterra - Grassy Koopa
description:
Artwork by Gren on FurAffinity.

Bowser: “I don’t know what this thing is, but it’s screwing up my castle! Somehow, the lava moat got replaced by a river! Of WATER! How did they manage that?! And...THEY TRAPPED ME IN MY OWN CELL! Someone come and get this grassy turtle out of here!
creator: FrogasaurusRex
